Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 17}While inside Tartarus, the {f 0 1 2}Reaper{f 0 1 27} may appear if you {f 0 1 2}stay on the same floor for too long{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 17}The Reaper is a terrifying foe. You'll want to avoid combat and hurry to the next floor as quickly as possible.[n]{f 1 1}
